channel.title: Diophantine-Equations on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Diophantine-Equations on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Combinatorics #3.1: Ordinary Generating Functions
item.description: Formal power series basics, ordinary generating functions, inversion identities, generalized binomial expansions, bounded counting examples, and recurrence-to-closed-form examples such as Fibonacci and Catalan.
